message:
Update episodic-memory plugin to v1.0.10

Enhanced search formatting with file metadata:
- Fixed search result formatting to prevent Claude Read tool 256KB limit failures
- Added file size and line count metadata for intelligent tool selection
- Clean 1-line format: 'Lines 10-25 in /path/file.jsonl (295.7KB, 1247 lines)'

Release notes: https://github.com/obra/episodic-memory/releases/tag/v1.0.10
